title: lathyrus pannonicus f. sumenii
intro: Lathyrus pannonicus f. sumenii, also known as the Hungarian pea, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an anti-diabetic agent. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus pannonicus f. sumenii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
